name: Peng

visual_attributes.morphology: giant bird with a back like Mount Tai
distinctive_features: wings like clouds filling the sky
transforms from a giant fish called Kun

functional_attributes.primary_function: symbol of great understanding and freedom
secondary_functions: epitome of the highest Daoist ideal

domain_specific_functional.journey: travels to the southern darkness, the Lake of Heaven

relationships.description: Peng transforms from a giant fish called Kun

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: mythical regions of northern and southern darkness
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: represents great understanding and the Daoist ideal of freedom

contrastive_constraints: NOT a small or average-sized bird
